issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases such as certificate installation failures or network errors.

scenarios.name: idor-profile-test
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully cover the required steps: capturing via intercept, sending to Repeater, modifying the ID, resending, and checking for a 200 OK with different data.

scenarios.name: intruder-sql-fuzz
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fail to provide the required instructions and thus score zero.
